case_title: AARON THOMAS VS. ELIZABETH DANTZKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT DANTZKER, ELIZABETH DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-18-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-17-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-27-2016

JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 59584620) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT DANTZKER, ELIZABETH
